subject: URGENT: Production API returning 500 errors for /checkout

messages.body: Hey — checkout endpoint has been throwing 500s for the last 25 minutes. Affects roughly 30% of traffic on /checkout and /checkout/confirm. We're paged. Can you join #incident-checkout now? Already looped in SRE and the payments on-call.

Update: error rate dropped to ~12% after a config rollback, still elevated. Looking like a downstream payments gateway timeout. Need a decision on whether to keep rolling back or hold. Need your read ASAP.

subject: Q3 Roadmap — looking for your sign-off before Thursday

messages.body: Hi — sharing the Q3 roadmap draft ahead of the leadership review. Three big bets: (1) revamp onboarding for self-serve, (2) launch the partner API, (3) sunset the legacy mobile app. I'd love your candid read on whether we're under-investing in retention. Can you reply with thoughts by EOD Thursday? Happy to jump on a 20-min call if easier.

subject: Weekly Standup — week of June 16 (notes + action items)

messages.body:
Sharing notes from this week's standup for visibility — no action required.

Highlights:
- Growth shipped the new referral flow to 100% of users, +8% signup conversion week-over-week.
- Mobile team wrapped v4.2 patch release; full v5 work continues.
- Data: nightly ETL job still failing intermittently, root cause is a key collision in the dedupe step. JIRA: DATA-1142.
- Hiring: closed two senior eng offers, one still in negotiation.

Blockers raised: none this week.

Full notes in the shared doc. Will continue next Friday.

subject: Re: CloudOps Pro — contract renewal, follow-up

messages.body: Hi — circling back on the renewal quote we sent on June 10. Our offer of 12% off list pricing holds through end of month. We've also added two new compliance reports (SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001) at no additional cost. Can you confirm direction by Friday so we can lock in the discount? Happy to do a quick call if you want to walk through the line items.
Friendly nudge — pricing window expires Friday. Let me know if you need anything from our side (case studies, security questionnaire, redlines on the MSA).

subject: Meeting request: AI-assisted feature review (30 min)

messages.body:
Hi! The product team has been prototyping an AI-assisted search feature and we'd love your perspective as we shape the beta scope. Would any of these slots work for a 30-min walkthrough?

- Tue June 24, 2:00–2:30pm
- Wed June 25, 11:00–11:30am
- Thu June 26, 3:30–4:00pm

If none of these work, send a couple of windows that do. We'll send a short brief 24 hours ahead so you can come prepared. Thanks!
